decisions.title: Run evaluator-LLM Ragas live metrics
decisions.current_boundary: Local Ragas-compatible proxy and promptfoo package gates are complete.
decisions.decision_needed: Approve paid/API-key evaluator execution and trace/result payload review.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run the approved Ragas live gate with redacted output only.

decisions.title: Run live web search provider smoke
decisions.current_boundary: Live web search runtime policy is defined without credentials.
decisions.decision_needed: Select provider/API key, domain allowlist, and retention boundary.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run a redacted live provider smoke after provider selection.

decisions.title: Run credentialed production DB smoke
decisions.current_boundary: Production DB access/audit policy first gate is complete without credentials.
decisions.decision_needed: Approve database target, readonly role, network path, audit retention, and rollback.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run allowlisted readonly query smoke with redacted audit summary.

decisions.title: Select MCP production auth provider and remote client smoke
decisions.current_boundary: Loopback transport/auth boundary and remote client auth contract are defined.
decisions.decision_needed: Choose auth provider, token issuance path, TLS/origin boundary, and client allowlist.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run remote client auth smoke against the approved endpoint.

decisions.title: Live-provider cross-process resume
decisions.current_boundary: Same-process resume and mock-only redacted SQLite cross-process resume are complete.
decisions.decision_needed: Approve durable request/provider payload storage policy or keep live-provider resume unclaimed.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run live-provider resume smoke only after storage/retention approval.

decisions.title: Production replay and approval audit storage
decisions.current_boundary: Redacted local replay, approval metadata, and 7-day trace contract first gates are complete.
decisions.decision_needed: Approve storage location, retention period, deletion behavior, and user/project/entity scope.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Implement approved Postgres/object-store retention path and smoke it.

decisions.title: External trace backend and production customer capture
decisions.current_boundary: Deployment trace retention contract is complete; no external backend is configured.
decisions.decision_needed: Select backend, retention above or equal to 7 days, and customer trace capture policy.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run external trace smoke with allowlisted attributes only.

decisions.title: Paid image-edit latency strategy
decisions.current_boundary: Latest paid canary passed API/cost/ROI/text checks but failed the 30s latency threshold; provider-quality image editing remains unproven.
decisions.decision_needed: Keep 30s target, relax portfolio threshold with rationale, or switch model/quality.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Run the approved paid canary/full gate after the latency strategy is chosen.

decisions.title: Cloud deployment path and final recorded demo
decisions.current_boundary: Docker, GitHub Actions, K8s/kind, architecture diagram, eval report, and storyboard are complete.
decisions.decision_needed: Select AWS/GCP/Azure or keep kind-only evidence, then approve final recording/link policy.
decisions.next_command_or_action: Deploy or record only after cloud/recording scope is selected.
